channel.title: Smedjan — Notes from the forge
channel.description: Writing on building Smedjan, owning your own language models, and the road ahead.

item.title: Forge your own: why everyone should own their language models
item.description: Why everyone should be able to build and own their own language models, and what Smedjan is for.

item.title: The headline writes itself: a 295K model in your browser
item.description: The Smedjan home-page headline is generated live by a 295K-parameter model compiled to WebAssembly, running in your browser with no server.

item.title: What's done, and what isn't
item.description: A map of Smedjan's real state: what trains today, what is experimental, and what is still on the roadmap.
